content: Use public broadcast channels + 2s polling fallback for live updates (cursors, chat, reactions, skip-vote). All consumers share room-{id}-live via RoomChannelProvider. Private channels + realtime.messages RLS hit a CHANNEL_ERROR rabbit hole and were abandoned (migration 20260419052512_realtime_private_channels.sql is marked DO NOT APPLY).

description: Realtime socket dies silently after the 1h JWT TTL — broadcasts (cursors, reactions, live chat) just stop with no error. Without realtime.setAuth(token) refresh, every >1h game silently breaks.
resolution: lib/supabase/client.ts already wires a 25-min realtime.setAuth refresh loop driven by /api/keepalive. Pinned by tests/e2e/realtime-auth-refresh.spec.ts. Don't strip this logic.

description: A trailing newline on NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY URL-encoded to %0A in the realtime WebSocket apikey query string and silently killed every broadcast — connection looked fine, just no messages.
resolution: lib/env.ts now .trim()s every secret. Don't undo that, and treat any whitespace in env values as radioactive.
